metadata.name: Scott Rao V60
metadata.author: Scott Rao
metadata.description: Centre-pour technique with an aggressive bloom spin (5–7 revolutions), two equal main pours separated by a 50%-drained wait, each followed by a gentle 2-revolution spin. Targets 22–24.5% extraction.

protocol.notes: Rao Spin — aggressive swirl 5–7 revolutions to fully saturate the bed
Pour to 195g total as fast as possible with a nearly vertical stream
Gentle spin — 2 revolutions to fill ribbed channels
Wait until slurry is ~50% drained (visual check)
Pour to 330g total — same fast, vertical technique
Final gentle spin — 2 revolutions to level the bed and break channels
